notes: Tiny utility file (88 lines, 2 theorems) packaging Mathlib's Legendre formula into a real-valued bound v_p(n!) ≤ (n-1)/(p-1) for Silverman IV.6.2 formal-logarithm convergence. Neither declaration is referenced by any other file in the project, making the entire file dead code at the project level. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides.
